# Tabulator Vendor Files

Vendored for the local KhmerIME lexicon editor.

- Package: `tabulator-tables`
- Version: `6.3.1`
- Source:
  - `https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.1/dist/js/tabulator.min.js`
  - `https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.1/dist/css/tabulator.min.css`

These files are committed so `make lexicon-editor` works offline and without an
npm build step.
